{

"rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent identifies several prior works and maps against the nearest works, providing a good assessment but not naming 3-5 specific works.",
    "R1.7": "Flags missing citations in key areas but does not audit every load-bearing citation with bibliographic precision.",
    "RX.1": "Identifies some uncertainty in claims but does not mark confidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) without any drift.",
    "RX.4": "Identifies potential harmful patterns and misuse scenarios, showing good awareness.",
    "RX.5": "Major rewrites are traced but minor edits lack traceability."
},
"confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.7,
    "RX.1": 0.6,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.8,
    "RX.5": 0.7
},
"blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent identifies several prior works and maps against the nearest works, providing a good assessment but not naming 3-5 specific works.
rationale.R1.7: Flags missing citations in key areas but does not audit every load-bearing citation with bibliographic precision.
rationale.RX.1: Identifies some uncertainty in claims but does not mark confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: Identifies potential harmful patterns and misuse scenarios, showing good awareness.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced but minor edits lack traceability.
